summary: Completed comprehensive testing of upmuch CRM MVP. Backend APIs working well (88.2% success rate), frontend user flows functional, authentication and CRUD operations successful. Only AI features limited by budget constraints.

budget_limited_features.issue: Budget exceeded for Emergent LLM key
budget_limited_features.note: Expected limitation with demo/test API key

budget_limited_features.issue: Budget exceeded for Emergent LLM key
budget_limited_features.note: Expected limitation with demo/test API key

minor_issues.issue: Mobile menu may not open consistently in all test scenarios
minor_issues.note: Needs further investigation - could be timing related

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections (hero, features, pricing, testimonials)
Login page renders with all form elements
Signup page renders with all form elements
Dashboard loads after authentication with stats and navigation
Lead creation via UI and API integration works
Deals page accessible and pipeline structure present
Tasks page accessible with kanban layout
All CRUD operations for leads, companies, deals, tasks, campaigns
Authentication flow and protected routes working
